options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates of the pin guide area.

options.name: -edge
options.description: Specifies the integer value where edge numbering starts from lower-left corner of a partition clock-wise.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the metal layer(s) for the pin guide.

options.name: -layerPriority
options.description: Specifies that pins should be assigned based on the layer order.

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition pin guide object.

options.name: -net
options.description: For nets, specifies the name of the net. For buses, specifies the name of the bus or the bus radix.

options.name: -netGroup
options.description: Specifies the name of the net group.

options.name: -offset_end
options.description: specify a distance in microns from ending corner of the edge.

options.name: -offset_start
options.description: specify a distance in microns from starting corner of the edge.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of the pin.

options.name: -pinGroup
options.description: Specifies the name of the pin group.
